title: Reconstructing magmatic histories with 3D diffusion modeling of complex crystals
description: 3D mineral stopwatches reveal multi-stage magmatic history before the 1820 lava fountaining eruption at Kīlauea volcano, Hawai’i. Magmas can be stored for decades then mobilized over days before ascending to the surface in a matter of hours.
content: Open Access This article is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International License, which permits any non-commercial use, sharing, distribution and reprod… [+846 chars]
de: Rekonstruktion magmatischer Geschichten mit 3D-Diffusionsmodellierung komplexer Kristalle. 3D-Mineralstoppuhren enthüllen die mehrstufige magmatische Geschichte vor dem Lavaausbruch im Jahr 1820 am Vulkan Kīlauea auf Hawaii. Magmen können jahrzehntelang gespeichert und dann über Tage hinweg mobilisiert werden, bevor sie innerhalb weniger Stunden an die Oberfläche aufsteigen.
en: Reconstructing magmatic histories with 3D diffusion modeling of complex crystals. 3D mineral stopwatches reveal multi-stage magmatic history before the 1820 lava fountaining eruption at Kīlauea volcano, Hawai’i. Magmas can be stored for decades then mobilized over days before ascending to the surface in a matter of hours.
la: Historias magmaticas componens cum 3D diffusione exemplarium complexorum crystallorum. 3D stopopationes minerales multi scaenae historiae magmaticae ante 1820 lavam eruptionem fontis Kīlauea vulcano, Hawai'i revelant. Magmas pro decenniis condi potest ante diebus ante ascensionem ad superficiem in materia horarum.
